message:
refactor(sendgrid): modernize connector and add compliance E2E tests

Remove boilerplate handler methods from SendGrid connector, delegating
lifecycle management to the FCP protocol layer. Add comprehensive
compliance test suite for zone and capability constraints.

Connector modernization:
- Remove explicit handle_configure(), handle_handshake(),
  handle_health(), handle_doctor() methods
- Delegate to trait-based handler dispatch
- Streamline initialization and state management

E2E testing:
- Add 220+ lines of compliance test scenarios
- Test SendGrid operations under zone/capability constraints
- Validate connector behavior against FCP compliance suite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
